task: Keep AST JSON roundtrip and build healthy while semantic workspace edits are added.
notes: Starter guard for the current edit-adjacent AST rebuild path.

task: Keep mirror-safe module edits packable on the common-print-form fixture while workspace write support is added.
notes: Protects the only currently supported size-changing edit class.

task: Keep the parse-form/build-form CLI roundtrip healthy on the baseline editable fixture while semantic workspace writes are added.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin parse-form tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/form.ast.json" && uv run formbin build-form "$tmpdir/form.ast.json" -o "$tmpdir/form.raw" && uv run formbin parse-form "$tmpdir/form.raw" -o "$tmpdir/reparsed.json" && cmp -s "$tmpdir/form.ast.json" "$tmpdir/reparsed.json"'
notes: End-to-end starter guard for future semantic edit rebuilds.

task: Apply a narrow semantic form-title edit on the baseline editable fixture and keep the workspace packable.
notes: Introduces the first supported semantic write path through `semantic/form.meta.json` on a non-split unpack workspace.

task: Expose the first semantic edit command as an end-to-end CLI flow on the baseline editable fixture.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin unpack tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/unpack" >/dev/null && python3 -c "import json,sys; from pathlib import Path; path=Path(sys.argv[1]); data=json.loads(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")); data[\"form_title\"] = \"Печать2\"; path.write_text(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + \"\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\", newline=\"\")" "$tmpdir/unpack/semantic/form.meta.json" && uv run formbin apply-semantic "$tmpdir/unpack" && uv run formbin pack "$tmpdir/unpack" -o "$tmpdir/edited.Form.bin" >/dev/null && python3 -c "import json,sys; from pathlib import Path; root=Path(sys.argv[1]); meta=json.loads((root / \"semantic/form.meta.json\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")); assert meta[\"form_title\"] == \"Печать2\"" "$tmpdir/unpack"'
notes: Confirms the user-facing command path stays explicit, optional, and pack-safe on the verified baseline fixture.

task: Apply a narrow command-title edit through `semantic/commands.json` on the baseline editable fixture and keep the workspace packable.
notes: Extends the semantic write budget to current root-command bridge titles while keeping the bridge match invariant intact.

task: Reject unsupported `semantic/strings.json` edits while only the current alias roles become writable.
notes: Confirms `strings.json` stays fail-closed for read-only roles instead of silently overwriting semantic workspace edits.

task: Apply a narrow form-event handler edit through `semantic/events.json` on the baseline editable fixture and keep the workspace packable.
notes: Extends the semantic write budget to current form-scope event handlers while keeping all other event fields read-only.

task: Apply supported `semantic/strings.json` alias edits for current form-title, form-event handler, and command-title roles on the baseline editable fixture.
notes: Keeps `strings.json` writable only where it aliases the already-supported semantic write surface.

task: Apply a current control-name alias edit through `semantic/strings.json` on the baseline editable fixture and keep the workspace packable.
notes: Extends the current strings alias write surface to explicit control-name bridge items without making `controls.tree.json` directly writable.

task: Apply a narrow direct control-label edit through `semantic/controls.tree.json` on the baseline editable fixture and keep the workspace packable.
notes: Extends the current write budget to explicit non-root control labels while keeping all structural control-tree fields read-only.

task: Apply a narrow direct control-pattern attribute rename through `semantic/attributes.json` on the baseline editable fixture and keep the workspace packable.
notes: Extends the current write budget to explicit control-pattern attribute bridge items while keeping marker semantics and structural attribute shape read-only.

task: Reject pending `semantic/layout.json` edits on the baseline editable fixture while that slice remains review-only.
notes: Keeps layout edits explicitly fail-closed on apply even though semantic diff can already render them for review.

task: Reject non-handler edits in `semantic/events.json` on the baseline editable fixture while only `handler` remains writable.
notes: Keeps the events slice fail-closed for every field except the current form-scope handler bridge.

task: Reject non-title edits in `semantic/commands.json` on the baseline editable fixture while only `title` remains writable.
notes: Keeps the commands slice fail-closed for every field except the current command-title bridge.

task: Reject structural `semantic/controls.tree.json` edits on the baseline editable fixture while only control labels remain writable.
notes: Keeps control-tree structure fail-closed on apply even though semantic diff can review pending tree edits.

task: Reject `semantic/attributes.json.owner_id` edits on the baseline editable fixture while only name/data_path remain writable.
notes: Keeps the attributes bridge ownership metadata read-only while direct rename edits remain writable.

task: Reject `semantic/controls.tree.json[].event_bindings` metadata edits on the baseline editable fixture while only control labels remain writable.
notes: Keeps richer control-event binding metadata read-only on apply even though semantic diff can already render those pending workspace edits for review.

task: Expose the direct attribute-rename write path as an end-to-end CLI flow on the baseline editable fixture.
notes: Confirms the user-facing `apply-semantic` command keeps the explicit control-pattern attribute path pack-safe while refreshing the derived control and strings slices.

task: Expose the explicit `control_name` alias write path as an end-to-end CLI flow on the baseline editable fixture.
notes: Confirms the user-facing `apply-semantic` command keeps the current `strings.json` control-name alias path pack-safe while refreshing the derived controls and attributes slices.

task: Expose the current command-title write path as an end-to-end CLI flow on the baseline editable fixture.
notes: Confirms the user-facing `apply-semantic` command keeps the current `commands.json[].title` path pack-safe while refreshing the derived command-title strings.

task: Expose the current event-handler write path as an end-to-end CLI flow on the baseline editable fixture.
notes: Confirms the user-facing `apply-semantic` command keeps the current `events.json[].handler` path pack-safe while refreshing the derived event-handler strings.

task: Expose the supported `strings.json` alias write path as an end-to-end CLI flow on the baseline editable fixture.
notes: Confirms the user-facing `apply-semantic` command keeps the current supported strings-alias path pack-safe while refreshing the derived form-meta, event, and command slices together.

task: Reject non-title edits in `semantic/form.meta.json` on the baseline editable fixture while only `form_title` remains writable.
notes: Keeps the form-meta slice fail-closed for every field except the current form-title bridge.
